description: Letter from Meir Messina to his employer or business partner in Gaza. Written in Hebrew. Dating: Second half of the 16th century or beginning of the 17th century, based on the assessment of Avraham David. Deals with business matters, including trade in textiles and ppers. The writer describes borrowing money with interest and business dealings with gentiles. Information from FGP.
description_he: מכתב מאיר מסינה למעסיקו בעזה (עברית), מחצית שנייה של המאה ה-16, עניינים עסקיים
